## Product Brief
1. Geordie AI is a security and governance platform purpose-built for AI agents.
2. It provides enterprises with a deep, real-time understanding of their agentic footprint, and the ability to observe agent posture and behavior.
3. The platform natively identifies and mitigates risk within AI agents to safely scale agentic innovation.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Named 'Most Innovative Startup 2026' at the annual RSAC Innovation Sandbox contest.
- Received a $5 million investment as one of the Top 10 Finalists of the Innovation Sandbox contest.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How does Geordie AI's platform integrate with existing enterprise security infrastructure?
- [ ] What specific types of AI agents does your platform support for governance and risk mitigation?
- [ ] Can you elaborate on the real-time understanding and observation capabilities of your platform for agentic behavior?
